name: Alarm
description: You touch an object or area up to near-sized to set a magical alarm. You instantly know when a creature touches or enters the warded area.

name: Burning Hands
description: You unleash a circle of flame from your hands. Choose a target within close range. It takes 1d6 damage.

name: Charm Person
description: You beguile one humanoid of LV 2 or less. It treats you as a trusted friend for the duration, but knows it was charmed afterward.

name: Detect Magic
description: You sense the presence of magic within near range. The GM tells you the location but not the nature of each magical aura you sense.

name: Feather Fall
description: You slow your rate of descent to land safely if you fall.

name: Floating Disk
description: You create a magical floating disk of force that follows you. The disk carries up to 20 gear slots of equipment and hovers at waist height.

name: Hold Portal
description: You hold a door, gate, or portal closed. A creature trying to open it must make a STR check vs. your spellcasting check.

name: Light
description: One object you touch glows with bright light that fills a near distance. Touch it again to end the spell.

name: Mage Armor
description: Your armor class becomes 14 (18 on a critical spellcasting check).

name: Magic Missile
description: You fire a glowing bolt that hits a target of your choice. It deals 1d4 damage. You make the spellcasting check with advantage.

name: Protection from Evil
description: Chaotic beings have disadvantage on attack rolls and hostile spellcasting checks against the target. These beings also can't possess, compel, or beguile the target. When cast on an already-possessed target, the possessing entity makes a CHA check vs. the last spellcasting check. On a failure, the entity is expelled.

name: Sleep
description: You weave a lulling spell that fills a near-sized cube extending from you. Choose a number of living creatures in the area up to your level. Those creatures fall into a deep sleep if they are LV 2 or less. Vigorous shaking or being injured wakes them.

name: Acid Arrow
description: A corrosive bolt of acid hits one target. The target takes 1d6 damage, and continues to take 1d6 damage each round while the spell is focused.

name: Alter Self
description: Your body takes on new features. Choose one: water-breathing, natural weapons (d6 damage), darkvision, or non-humanoid appearance.

name: Detect Thoughts
description: You detect the surface thoughts of one creature within range. Each round you maintain focus, the GM tells you the creature's immediate thoughts.

name: Fixed Object
description: An object you touch weighing up to 5 lbs becomes fixed in its current position. Nothing can move it while focused.

name: Hold Person
description: You paralyze one humanoid creature of LV 4 or less. It is aware but can't take actions or move while focused.

name: Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible for the duration. The spell ends if the target attacks or casts a spell.

name: Knock
description: A door, gate, or other portal instantly opens, defeating mundane locks. The sound of opening can be heard at far range.

name: Levitate
description: You float a near distance vertically per round. You can hold yourself in place by grabbing something solid.

name: Mirror Image
description: You create a number of illusory duplicates equal to half your level (minimum 1). Attackers must randomly determine which image to target. Duplicates are destroyed when targeted.

name: Misty Step
description: You teleport a near distance to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Silence
description: You magically mute sound in a near cube within the spell's range. Creatures inside are deafened, and any sounds they create cannot be heard.

name: Web
description: You create a near-sized cube of sticky, dense spider web within range. A creature stuck in the web can't move and must succeed on a Strength check vs. your spellcasting check to free itself.

name: Animate Dead
description: You touch the remains of a humanoid creature, animating it as a skeleton or zombie under your control. The undead obeys simple commands.

name: Dispel Magic
description: You end one spell affecting a target you can see within range.

name: Fabricate
description: You turn raw materials into a finished work. The work can be as complex as a lockbox or simple furniture.

name: Fireball
description: You hurl a tiny bead of fire that erupts at a point within range. All creatures within a near-sized cube of that point take 4d6 damage.

name: Fly
description: You can fly a near distance per round. You can hover in place.

name: Gaseous Form
description: You and your gear transform into a cloud of smoke. You can move a near distance each round and fit through small gaps.

name: Illusion
description: You create a convincing visible and audible illusion that fills a near-sized cube within range. Creatures who interact with it make an INT check vs. your spellcasting check to disbelieve.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: You shoot a ray of lightning from your hands. All creatures in a straight line out to far distance take 3d6 damage.

name: Magic Circle
description: You conjure a rune circle preventing a chosen creature type from attacking anyone inside the circle.

name: Protection from Energy
description: One creature you touch becomes impervious to the wild fury of the elements. Choose fire, cold, or electricity. The target is immune to harm from energy of the chosen type.

name: Sending
description: You send a brief mental message to any creature with whom you are familiar who is on the same plane.

name: Speak with Dead
description: A dead body you touch answers your questions in a distant, wheezing voice. You can ask up to three yes or no questions (one at a time). If cast more than once in 24 hours, treat a failed spellcasting check as a critical failure.

name: Arcane Eye
description: You conjure an invisible eye that you can see through. It can see in the dark (to near) and flies near per round.

name: Cloudkill
description: A putrid cloud of yellow poison appears in a near-sized cube within range. Creatures inside take 2d6 damage per round. Creatures of LV 9 or less fully inside at the start of their turn instantly die.

name: Confusion
description: You mesmerize one creature within range. While focused, the creature can't take actions and moves in a random direction each round.

name: Control Water
description: You control the movement of water up to 100 feet wide and 100 feet deep, moving and shaping it as you choose.

name: Dimension Door
description: You teleport yourself and one willing creature within close range to any point you can see.

name: Divination
description: You ask the GM one yes or no question about a fact. The GM answers truthfully.

name: Passwall
description: A tunnel of your height opens in a barrier you touch and lasts for the duration. The passage can be up to near distance in length and must be in a straight line.

name: Polymorph
description: You transform a creature you touch into another natural creature of equal or smaller size. Any gear the target carries melds into its new form. The target gains the creature's physical statistics but retains its non-physical statistics. If the target goes to 0 HP it reverts to true form at half its prior HP.

name: Resilient Sphere
description: You conjure a weightless, glassy sphere around you that extends out to close range. Nothing can pass through or crush the sphere. You can roll the sphere a near distance on your turn.

name: Stoneskin
description: Your skin becomes like granite. Your armor class becomes 17 (20 on a critical spellcasting check).

name: Telekinesis
description: You lift a creature or object with your mind. Choose a target that weighs 1,000 pounds or less. You can move it a near distance in any direction and hold it in place.

name: Wall of Force
description: You lift your hands, conjuring a transparent wall of force. The thin wall must be contiguous and can cover a near-sized area. Nothing on the same plane can physically pass through the wall.

name: Antimagic Shell
description: A near-sized cube of null-magic forms centered on you. Magic doesn't work within the area, including your own spells.

name: Create Undead
description: You summon a wight or wraith under your control. The undead obeys simple commands for the duration.

name: Disintegrate
description: You fire a ray of energy at one creature or nonmagical object. A creature of LV 5 or less is instantly destroyed. A creature of LV 6+ takes 3d8 damage. Non-magical objects are destroyed.

name: Hold Monster
description: You paralyze one creature you can see within range. It is aware but can't take actions or move while focused.

name: Plane Shift
description: You fold space and time, transporting yourself and all willing creatures within close range to a location on another plane of your choice. Unless you have been to your intended location before, you appear in a random place on the destination plane.

name: Power Word Kill
description: You utter the Word of Doom. One creature you target of LV 9 or less dies if it hears you. Treat a failed spellcasting check as a critical failure, and roll the mishap with disadvantage.

name: Prismatic Orb
description: You send a strobing orb of energy streaking toward a target within range. Choose fire, cold, or electricity. The orb deals 3d8 damage. If the energy type is anathema to the target's existence, the orb deals double damage.

name: Scrying
description: You look into a crystal ball or reflecting pool, calling up images of a distant place. For the duration, you can see and hear a creature or location on the same plane. DC 18 to cast if the target is unfamiliar to you. Each round, creatures you view may make a Wisdom check vs. your last spellcasting check to become aware of your observation.

name: Shapechange
description: You transform yourself and any gear into another natural creature you've seen of LV 10 or less. You assume the creature's physical statistics but retain your non-physical statistics. If you go to 0 HP, you revert to your true form at 1 HP.

name: Summon Extraplanar
description: You reach into the outer planes, summoning an elemental or outsider of LV 7 or less. The creature is under your control and acts on your turn. If you lose focus, the creature becomes hostile. You must pass a spellcasting check on your turn to return the creature to the outer planes.

name: Teleport
description: You and any willing creatures within close range teleport to a location you specify on your same plane. You can travel to a known teleportation sigil or a location you've been before. Otherwise, 50% chance of arriving off-target.

name: Wish
description: This mighty spell alters reality. Make a single wish, stating it as exactly as possible. Your wish occurs, as interpreted by the GM. Treat a failed spellcasting check as a critical failure, and roll the mishap with disadvantage.

name: Bless
description: One creature you touch gains one luck token.

name: Cure Wounds
description: You place your hands on a creature and heal it. Roll 1 + half your level d6s. The target regains that many hit points.

name: Holy Weapon
description: One weapon you touch becomes magical. It grants +1 to attack and damage rolls for the duration.

name: Shield of Faith
description: A protective force wrought of your holy conviction surrounds you. You gain a +2 bonus to your armor class for the duration.

name: Turn Undead
description: You rebuke undead creatures, forcing them to flee. You must present a holy symbol. Undead within near make a CHA check vs. your spellcasting check. On a failure by 10+ points (if equal to or less than your level), the undead is destroyed. Otherwise, on a fail, it flees for 5 rounds.

name: Augury
description: You cast lots to divine the outcome of a planned action. Ask the GM one question about a course of action. The GM answers truthfully using one of: good omen, bad omen, or uncertain omen.

name: Blind/Deafen
description: You blind or deafen one creature you can see. It has disadvantage on tasks requiring the affected sense while focused.

name: Cleansing Weapon
description: One weapon you touch deals an additional 1d4 damage for the duration (1d6 against undead and demons).

name: Smite
description: You call down punishing flames on a creature you can see within range. It takes 1d6 damage.

name: Zone of Truth
description: You compel a creature you can see to speak truth. It can't utter a deliberate lie while within range.

name: Command
description: You issue a single verbal command to one creature you can see. The creature obeys the command while focused. The command must be a single word.

name: Lay to Rest
description: You instantly destroy one undead creature of LV 9 or less. If the undead's level is higher, it takes 4d6 damage.

name: Mass Cure
description: All allies within near range regain 2d6 hit points.

name: Rebuke Unholy
description: You rebuke creatures who oppose your alignment, forcing them to flee. You must present a holy symbol. If you are lawful or neutral, this spell affects demons, devils, and outsiders. If you are chaotic, this spell affects angels and natural creatures of the wild. Affected creatures make a CHA check vs. your spellcasting check. Fail by 10+ (if equal to or less than your level): destroyed. Otherwise: flees for 5 rounds.

name: Restoration
description: With the touch of your hands, you expunge curses and illnesses. One curse, illness, or affliction of your choice affecting the target creature ends.

name: Commune
description: You commune with your deity. Ask your god up to three yes or no questions. The GM answers truthfully using the knowledge your deity possesses. Deities are mighty, but not omniscient.

name: Flame Strike
description: You call down a holy pillar of fire on a point within range. All creatures within a near-sized cylinder take 2d6 damage.

name: Pillar of Salt
description: A creature you target turns into a statue made of hardened salt. You can target a creature of LV 5 or less. If you successfully focus on this spell for 3 rounds in a row, the transformation becomes permanent.

name: Regenerate
description: A creature you touch regains 1d4 hit points on your turn for the duration. This spell also regrows lost body parts.

name: Wrath
description: Your weapons become magical +2 and deal an additional d8 damage for the spell's duration.

name: Divine Vengeance
description: You become a divine avatar. You can fly near per round, your weapons are magical, and you gain +4 to attack and damage rolls for the duration.

name: Dominion
description: You summon beings with a combined LV of 16 or less. Lawful and neutral casters summon angels; chaotic casters summon demons. They obey simple commands.

name: Heal
description: One creature you touch is healed to its full hit point maximum. You can't cast this spell again until you complete a rest.

name: Judgment
description: You banish a creature of LV 10 or less to stand before your god's judgment. At the end of the duration, the creature returns. If its actions were pleasing to the deity, it returns healed. If angering, it returns at 1 HP.

name: Prophecy
description: You commune directly with your god for guidance. Ask the GM one question. The GM answers truthfully using the knowledge your god possesses. You cannot cast this spell again until you complete penance.

name: Death Maw
description: Caster's maw becomes abnormally large and swallows the target. The target takes 2d6 damage at the start of their turns. The target can escape if 20 or more damage is dealt to the caster in one attack.

name: Deathless Veil
description: The target is protected from death. The first time the target is killed, they are instead reduced to 1 HP.

name: Detect Undead
description: The caster can sense the presence of undead within double near range.

name: Fangs of Dread
description: The caster grows fangs like vampires dripping with necrotic sludge. A bite attack (+5 STR/DEX) against a Close target deals 1d6 damage at the start of the target's turn.

name: Ghoulish Radiance
description: A ghoulish green orb of light appears mid air. All undead within Near range of the light have advantage on their attack rolls.

name: Heart Wrench
description: The target feels cold hands gripping its heart and takes 1d4 damage at the start of their turn. If the spell kills them, their heart appears in the caster's hand.

name: Sickening Ray
description: A single creature gets hit with a stream of sickly green energy. They vomit blood and cannot take turns.

name: Freeze
description: One creature is hit by a freezing cold energy and cannot move until the end of their next turn.

name: Ghostly Armour
description: The caster can only be damaged by silvered or magical weapons and spells.

name: Haunt
description: The target is haunted by cosmic horrors and cannot gain the benefits of a Rest.

name: Hunger of Oedinn
description: A column of gnashing teeth comes out of the caster's hand and deals 2d6 damage.

name: Necrotic Armour
description: The target's AC goes up by 3. Whenever a melee weapon attack hits the target, the attacker's blood comes out of their orifices in red mist form and they lose 1d4 HP.

name: Shadowheart
description: The caster turns incorporeal and can only be damaged by magic weapons and spells.

name: Summon Undead
description: The caster summons one undead creature that obeys them. The Level of the summoned undead depends on the Tier the spell is cast at (Tier 1-5). The tier must be declared before casting. The caster cannot have more than one summoned undead at the same time.
_note: Variable tier spell (1-5); tier here represents minimum tier

name: Bind
description: Creatures in a near-sized cube within range are immobilized by magical chains, vines, or similar. Each must succeed on a STR check vs. your spellcasting check on their turn to get free. They take 1d4 damage for each failed escape.

name: Brand
description: You imprint an enemy with a burning mark, dealing 1d6 initial damage and 1d6 damage per round. The mark emits light out to near and remains as long as you focus.

name: Essence Storm
description: You surround a foe in a storm of magic, dealing 4d6 damage to it and 1d6 damage to each creature within close of it. This repeats each time you focus. If you successfully focus on this spell for 3 rounds in a row, the target is ripped apart and destroyed.

name: Force Dart
description: You fling a projectile of pure energy, dealing 1d6 damage to one target.

name: Overwhelm
description: Your eyes glow, your voice loudens, and the ground around you vibrates. Enemies within near of you take 3d6 damage and must make a CHA check vs. your spellcasting check. If they fail, they flee from you for 5 rounds unless immune to morale checks.

name: Penetrating Beam
description: You fire a beam of energy from your hands, hitting all creatures in a straight line out to a far distance. Creatures hit by the beam take 3d6 damage.

name: Repulse
description: You emit a burst of energy in all directions, dealing 1d4 damage to creatures and objects within close range and pushing them a close distance away from you.

name: Spell Burst
description: A point you can see within range explodes with magic. All creatures in a near-sized cube around that point take 3d6 damage.

name: Fire Bolt
description: A bolt of fire strikes one target within near range for 1d6 damage.

name: Blinding Flash
description: A burst of white light erupts. One target makes a CON save (DC 12) or is blinded for 1d4 rounds.

name: Globe of Daylight
description: A floating orb of bright light illuminates a near-sized area. You can move it up to near each round as a free action.

name: Sense Magic
description: You detect the presence and location of all active magic within near range.

name: Repel Animals
description: Natural animals of 2 HD or fewer will not willingly approach you for the duration.

name: Shadow Cloak
description: You blend into shadows and dim light. Advantage on stealth checks while in low-light conditions.

name: Chill Touch
description: Ice-cold energy deals 1d4 damage to one creature you touch. That creature cannot regain HP until the start of your next turn.

name: Force Shield
description: A barrier of unseen force grants you +3 AC until the start of your next turn.

name: Ventriloquism
description: You project your voice to appear to come from any point within near range.

name: Befuddle
description: One creature of LV 2 or less becomes too confused to act. It can only move on its turn for the duration.

name: Fireball (Lesser)
description: Fire erupts in a close-sized area within far range. All creatures inside take 2d6 damage.

name: Levitate
description: You float vertically a near distance per round and can hold yourself in place by grabbing something solid.

name: Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible. Ends if they attack or cast a spell.

name: Wink-Out
description: You teleport to any unoccupied space within near range you can see.

name: Fear
description: One creature makes a WIS save (DC 12) or flees from you for 1d4 rounds.

name: Carpet of Adhesion
description: A near-sized floor area becomes supernaturally sticky. Creatures inside make a STR save (DC 12) each round or cannot move.

name: Fireball
description: A bead of fire erupts in a near-sized area within far range. All creatures inside take 4d6 damage.

name: Fly
description: You fly a near distance per round.

name: Dispel Magic
description: You end one active spell on a target you can see within near range.

name: Paralysis
description: One humanoid of LV 4 or less is paralyzed. They are aware but cannot act while focused.

name: Lightning Arc
description: A bolt of lightning shoots from your hands in a straight line to far range. All creatures in the line take 3d6 damage.

name: Incinerate
description: A column of fire engulfs one creature within far range for 6d6 damage. If reduced to 0 HP, the body is reduced to ash.

name: Wall of Fire
description: A near-long wall of roaring flame appears within far range. Creatures that pass through take 4d6 damage.

name: Protection Circle
description: You inscribe a magic circle. Choose one creature type (undead, demons, or natural beasts) — they cannot enter or target those inside.

name: Globe of Silence
description: No sound may enter or exit a near-sized sphere centered within far range.

name: Meteor Strike
description: A fiery boulder crashes from above. All creatures in a near-sized area within far range take 8d6 damage.

name: Annihilate
description: One creature makes a CON save (DC 15) or is instantly slain. On a success, they take 6d6 damage instead.

name: Time Freeze
description: Time stops for everything except you for 1d4 rounds. You may act normally; all else is frozen.

name: Elemental Bolt
description: A focused bolt of your chosen element strikes one target within near range for 1d6 damage.

name: Elemental Shroud
description: Your body radiates elemental energy. Creatures that strike you in melee take 1d4 damage of your element's type.

name: Elemental Sense
description: You sense disturbances in your element within far range and know their direction and rough distance.

name: Calm Element
description: You suppress a natural manifestation of your element within near range — still water, extinguish fire, stop wind, or halt a tremor.

name: Elemental Armor
description: Your skin crackles with elemental energy. You gain +2 AC for the duration.

name: Elemental Blast
description: A surge of elemental force hits one creature. It makes a STR save (DC 12) or is pushed near and knocked prone.

name: Elemental Communication
description: You speak to elementals of your type within near range. They understand you, though they are not compelled to cooperate.

name: Call Element
description: A near-sized volume of your element appears in an open space within near range.

name: Elemental Ward
description: You grant yourself resistance to your element for the duration, taking half damage from sources of that type.

name: Minor Elemental Form
description: You gain one benefit based on your element — Air: fall any distance safely; Earth: ignore difficult terrain; Fire: your touch ignites flammable objects; Water: breathe and move freely underwater.

name: Elemental Burst
description: Elemental energy erupts in a close-sized area within near range. All creatures inside take 2d6 damage.

name: Elemental Grasp
description: Tendrils of your element seize one creature within near range. It makes a STR save (DC 12) or is restrained for the duration.

name: Summon Lesser Elemental
description: A lesser elemental of your type appears and obeys you. It has HP equal to twice your level and deals 1d6 damage per strike.

name: Elemental Speed
description: You move with supernatural swiftness. Your speed doubles and you may move and act in the same round without penalty.

name: Elemental Shape
description: You gain a physical quality of your element — Air: fly near/round; Earth: +3 AC and ignore knockback; Fire: melee attacks deal +1d6 fire damage; Water: move through water freely and breathe underwater.

name: Elemental Torrent
description: A massive surge of your element blasts a near-sized area within far range. All creatures inside take 3d6 damage.

name: Summon Elemental
description: A full elemental of your type appears within close range. It has HP equal to 5 times your level, deals 2d6 damage per strike, and serves for 1 hour.

name: Elemental Body
description: You become partially elemental. You are immune to your chosen element, and your melee attacks deal +1d6 elemental damage.

name: Elemental Control
description: You command a near-sized body of your element to move and shape itself as you direct — reshape a river, form a wall of stone, direct a fire's path, etc.

name: Elemental Storm
description: A howling storm of your element fills a near-sized area within far range. All creatures inside take 4d6 damage per round.

name: Summon Greater Elemental
description: A towering elemental of your type appears. It has HP equal to 8 times your level, deals 3d6 damage per strike, and serves until dismissed.

name: Elemental Avatar
description: You transform into a being of pure elemental force. AC 16, immune to your element, melee attacks deal an additional 2d6 elemental damage.

name: Cataclysm
description: Your element erupts catastrophically. All creatures in a near-sized area take 8d6 damage and suffer an element-specific condition — Air: deafened 1 day; Earth: restrained under rubble; Fire: burning for 2d6/round until extinguished; Water: drowning (incapacitated).

name: Elemental Ascension
description: You become a true elemental. AC 18, immune to all non-magical damage and your element, fly or burrow near each round, melee attacks deal 4d6 elemental damage.

name: Mend Flesh
description: You touch a creature and restore 1d4 HP.

name: Cause Fear
description: One creature makes a WIS save (DC 12) or flees from you for 1d4 rounds.

name: Befriend Animal
description: One natural animal of 2 HD or fewer becomes friendly toward you for 1 hour and will follow simple requests.

name: Spoil
description: You touch food or drink. It becomes foul — anyone who consumes it has disadvantage on all rolls for 1 hour (CON save DC 12 to resist).

name: Commune with Spirits
description: You ask one question of a nearby spirit or ancestral presence. The GM answers as best the spirit knows.

name: Cackle Curse
description: One creature within near range makes a WIS save (DC 12) or falls into helpless laughter for 1 round, unable to act.

name: Nightvision
description: You see clearly in total darkness to near range for the duration.

name: Poison Touch
description: A creature you touch makes a CON save (DC 12) or takes 1d6 poison damage per round for 1d4 rounds.

name: Witch Sight
description: You see invisible creatures, detect active magic, and sense curses on creatures or objects within near range.

name: Entangle
description: Vines and roots erupt in a close-sized area within near range. All creatures inside make a STR save (DC 12) or are restrained.

name: Sleep
description: You weave a lulling hex. Up to 2 creatures of LV 2 or less that you can see within near range fall into deep sleep. Injury wakes them.

name: Object Read
description: You touch an object and receive impressions of its recent history — who held it, strong emotions, and major events in its presence.

name: Evil Eye
description: You fix your gaze on one creature within near range. It has disadvantage on all rolls for the duration. CON save (DC 12) to resist.

name: Polymorph (Hex)
description: You transform one creature of LV 3 or less into a small animal of your choice. CON save (DC 12) resists. Reverts when it takes damage.

name: Mind Bond
description: You link your senses to a willing creature you touch. You see and hear through them for the duration.

name: Shadow Walk
description: You and up to two willing creatures step into shadows and emerge from any shadow you can see within far range.

name: Poison Mist
description: A cloud of greenish vapour fills a close-sized area within near range. All creatures inside take 2d6 poison damage per round.

name: Slay Living
description: One creature within near range makes a CON save (DC 13) or takes 4d6 necrotic damage. If slain, it cannot be raised as undead.

name: Summon Demons
description: You call 1d4 lesser demons that serve you for 1 hour. Each has 8 HP and deals 1d6 damage per strike.

name: Flesh to Stone
description: One creature within near range makes a CON save (DC 13) or turns to stone. Ends when you dispel it or they succeed on a nightly save.

name: Speak with Dead
description: A corpse within close range answers your questions for 10 minutes. It knows only what it knew in life and must answer truthfully.

name: Death Curse
description: One creature you can see makes a CON save (DC 14) or is reduced to 0 HP at the start of its next turn. On a success, it takes 6d6 damage instead.

name: Animate Dead
description: You animate 1d4 corpses within near range as zombies or skeletons that obey your commands.

name: Gate
description: You tear open a rift summoning a powerful demon (LV equal to yours +2). It serves for 10 rounds before returning.

name: Pestilence
description: A supernatural plague spreads from one creature you touch (CON save DC 15 or infected). The disease spreads to anyone the creature touches unless they succeed the same save.

name: Apocalyptic Curse
description: One creature has disadvantage on all rolls, takes 2d6 damage at the start of each of its turns, and cannot regain HP. Lasts until dispelled.

name: Healing Touch
description: You touch a creature and restore 1d6 HP.

name: Holy Light
description: A burst of radiant light fills a near-sized area. Undead and demons within take 1d6 radiant damage and have disadvantage on all rolls until the start of your next turn.

name: Bless
description: Up to three creatures you can see gain +1 to attack rolls and saving throws for the duration.

name: Protection from Evil
description: Chaotic and demonic beings have disadvantage on attacks and hostile spellcasting checks against one creature you touch.

name: Detect Evil
description: You sense the presence and rough direction of evil, undead, or demonic creatures within far range.

name: Light
description: An object you touch glows with bright light that fills a near area. Touch it again to end the spell.

name: Sanctuary
description: One creature you touch cannot be targeted by attacks for 1 round unless it attacks first.

name: Purify
description: You purify all food, water, and air within close range, removing poison, disease, and curses.

name: Cure Disease
description: You touch a creature and remove one disease, poison, or curse afflicting it.

name: Hold Undead
description: Undead within near range make a WIS save (DC 12) or are paralyzed for the duration.

name: Restoration
description: You remove one ability score penalty, condition (blinded, deafened, poisoned), or curse from a creature you touch.

name: Shield of Faith
description: A shimmering divine field surrounds one creature you touch, granting +2 AC for the duration.

name: Consecrate
description: You sanctify a near-sized area. Undead and demons entering it take 1d6 radiant damage each round they remain inside.

name: Mass Healing
description: Up to four creatures within near range each recover 2d6 HP.

name: Exorcism
description: You expel a possessing entity, ghost, or demon from a creature or place. It makes a WIS save (DC 13) or is cast out and barred for 1 day.

name: Sunburst
description: A beam of brilliant holy light strikes all undead and demons within a near-sized area, each taking 4d6 radiant damage. Living creatures are unharmed.

name: Commune
description: You ask your deity three yes or no questions. The GM answers truthfully.

name: Resurrection
description: You restore a dead creature to life. It returns with 1 HP. Cannot restore those dead more than 1 week or whose bodies are destroyed.

name: Holy Aura
description: All creatures you choose within near range gain +4 AC, advantage on saves, and immunity to charm and fear for the duration.

name: Banish Demon
description: One demon or devil within near range makes a WIS save (DC 14) or is instantly returned to its plane of origin and barred for 1 year.

name: Miracle
description: You petition your deity. One impossible thing happens — a creature restored to full HP, a curse lifted from a region, or a question answered. GM's discretion.

name: Divine Wrath
description: Blazing holy fire rains on a near-sized area within far range. All creatures take 8d6 radiant damage. Undead and demons take double.

name: Dark Healing Touch
description: You touch a creature (including undead) and restore 1d6 HP.

name: Cause Fear
description: One creature within near range makes a WIS save (DC 12) or flees from you for 1d4 rounds.

name: Darkness
description: You snuff all light in a near-sized area for the duration. Creatures within cannot see anything.

name: Deathly Touch
description: A chill passes into a creature you touch. It makes a CON save (DC 12) or takes 1d6 necrotic damage and cannot regain HP until the start of your next turn.

name: Sense Evil
description: You detect the presence and location of evil, undead, and demonic creatures within far range.

name: Curse
description: One creature makes a WIS save (DC 12) or takes -2 to all rolls for 1 hour.

name: Animate Corpse
description: You animate one nearby corpse as a skeleton or zombie that follows simple commands.

name: Unholy Presence
description: Creatures of 1 HD or fewer that can see you must make a WIS save (DC 12) or be frightened and unable to approach you.

name: Wither
description: One creature makes a CON save (DC 12) or one ability score of your choice is reduced by 2 for 1 day.

name: Speak with Dead
description: You call the spirit of a nearby corpse. It answers up to three questions truthfully before departing.

name: Darkness Wave
description: A wave of supernatural darkness rolls outward from you. All non-undead, non-demon creatures within near range take 2d6 damage and are blinded for 1 round.

name: Bone Cage
description: Bones erupt from nearby remains and cage one creature within near range. It makes a STR save (DC 12) or is restrained for the duration.

name: Death's Embrace
description: You touch a willing creature. It appears and registers as dead to all magical detection and mundane examination for 1 hour.

name: Slay Living
description: One living creature makes a CON save (DC 13) or takes 4d6 necrotic damage. If slain, it rises immediately as a zombie under your control.

name: Mass Fear
description: All living creatures within a near-sized area make a WIS save (DC 12) or flee in terror for 1d4 rounds.

name: Control Undead
description: You seize control of up to 1d6 undead within near range. They obey your commands for 1 hour, then revert.

name: Pestilence
description: One creature you touch makes a CON save (DC 13) or contracts a supernatural wasting disease. It takes 1d6 necrotic damage per hour and cannot recover HP until cured.

name: Death Spell
description: Up to 2d4 HD of living creatures within near range must make CON saves (DC 14) or die, targeting weakest first.

name: Bone Golem
description: You animate a mass of bones into a powerful construct. It has HP equal to 4 times your level, deals 2d6 damage per strike, and obeys your commands.

name: Lich Touch
description: One creature you touch makes a CON save (DC 14) or begins to wither, losing 1d6 HP per round and unable to recover HP while focused.

name: Apocalypse
description: A wave of necrotic death washes over a near-sized area within far range. All living creatures take 8d6 necrotic damage. Those slain rise immediately as zombies under your control.

name: True Death
description: One creature makes a CON save (DC 15) or is slain outright. Its body crumbles to dust, preventing any form of resurrection.

name: Healing Herbs
description: You call upon nature to heal. One creature you touch recovers 1d6 HP.

name: Entangle
description: Vines and roots erupt in a close-sized area within near range. All creatures inside make a STR save (DC 12) or are restrained.

name: Speak with Animals
description: You communicate freely with natural animals within near range for the duration.

name: Thunderclap
description: A crack of thunder shakes the air. All creatures within close range (except yourself) take 1d4 damage and are deafened for 1 round.

name: Barkskin
description: One creature you touch gains +2 AC as their skin hardens like bark.

name: Pass Without Trace
description: You and up to four willing creatures leave no tracks, scent, or sound. Advantage on stealth checks for the duration.

name: Faerie Fire
description: Objects and creatures in a near-sized area glow with dim light. Affected creatures cannot benefit from invisibility, and attack rolls against them have advantage.

name: Animal Form
description: You transform into any natural animal up to wolf-sized. You retain your WIS but otherwise use the animal's stats.

name: Summon Animal
description: A loyal natural animal (wolf, bear, eagle, or boar) of your choice appears within close range and fights alongside you.

name: Call Lightning
description: Clouds gather and lightning strikes one creature within far range for 2d6 damage. You can call one bolt per round while focusing.

name: Cure Disease
description: You remove one disease, poison, or curse from a creature you touch.

name: Warp Wood
description: Wood within near range twists and warps. Wooden weapons deal -1 damage, wooden doors burst or jam, wooden structures crack.

name: Stone Shape
description: You reshape a near-sized volume of stone however you wish — open a passage, seal a door, or raise a low wall.

name: Call of the Wild
description: 1d6 natural animals of appropriate size appear and fight for you for 1 hour.

name: Earthquake
description: The ground shakes in a far-sized area. All creatures on the ground make a DEX save (DC 13) or fall prone. Structures crack; tunnels may collapse.

name: Wind Wall
description: A wall of howling wind stretches near in length. Ranged attacks through it automatically miss. Flying creatures must make STR saves (DC 12) or be blown away.

name: Control Weather
description: You alter the weather in a mile-wide area for 1 hour — call rain, clear skies, fog, strong wind, or light snow.

name: Mass Cure
description: Up to four creatures within near range each recover 3d6 HP.

name: Creeping Doom
description: A writhing mass of insects fills a near-sized area within far range. All creatures inside take 4d6 damage per round.

name: Greater Animal Form
description: You transform into any natural animal up to elephant-sized. You retain your WIS and may revert and re-transform freely within the duration.

name: Nature's Wrath
description: A pillar of primal energy erupts in a near-sized area within far range. All creatures take 8d6 damage. Plants and animals in the area are unharmed and enraged against anything that survived.

name: Reincarnate
description: You restore a dead creature to life in a new body — a random humanoid ancestry determined by the GM. Returns with full HP and no memories of death.

name: Sense Minds
description: You sense the presence and rough emotions of all thinking creatures within near range. You know if they are hostile, afraid, or calm.

name: Read Aura
description: You read one creature's aura. Learn their general power level, alignment, and whether they bear any active magical or psionic effects.

name: Commune with Dead
description: You sense and speak with a nearby spirit or ghost. It may answer up to three questions truthfully before departing.

name: Resist Psychic
description: You steel your mind. Advantage on saves against psionic attacks, charm, possession, and mind control for the duration.

name: Detect Deception
description: You know when a creature within close range intentionally lies for the duration.

name: Psychic Alarm
description: You attune to a room or object within close range. You instantly know when a creature enters the room or touches the object.

name: Sixth Sense
description: You sense danger moments before it arrives. You cannot be surprised, and you have advantage on the first attack roll or save each round.

name: Object Read
description: You touch an object and receive impressions of its recent history — who held it, strong emotions, and major events in its presence.

name: Sense Supernatural
description: You detect supernatural entities (ghosts, demons, undead, and beings of magic) within far range and know their direction and distance.

name: Mind Shield
description: Other creatures cannot read your thoughts, detect your presence psionically, or sense your aura while this is active.

name: Telepathy
description: You read the surface thoughts of one creature within near range. Each round you focus, the GM tells you its immediate thoughts.

name: Clairvoyance
description: You see and hear through a point you can visualize within 1 mile, as if standing there invisibly.

name: Mind Link
description: You form a silent telepathic bond with up to three willing creatures. You may communicate wordlessly with them at any range.

name: Psychic Blast
description: A wave of psychic force strikes one creature for 2d6 psychic damage. It makes a WIS save (DC 12) or is stunned until the start of your next turn.

name: Astral Projection
description: Your spirit leaves your body and travels invisibly up to 1 mile. You see and hear normally but cannot interact physically. Your body is defenseless while projected.

name: Domination
description: One humanoid of LV 4 or less makes a WIS save (DC 13) or is under your mental command for 1 hour. It won't harm itself.

name: Group Mind
description: You link up to eight willing creatures in a shared mental network. All share sensory information and can communicate instantly.

name: Psionic Scream
description: A wave of psychic agony radiates from you. All creatures within near range take 3d6 psychic damage and are stunned for 1 round (WIS save DC 12 halves damage and negates stun).

name: Precognition
description: You experience flashes of the immediate future. You cannot be surprised and have advantage on the first attack roll or save each round.

name: Mass Domination
description: Up to 1d4 humanoids of LV 4 or less within near range each make a WIS save (DC 14) or come under your mental control.

name: Mind Crush
description: You assault one creature's mind with devastating force. It takes 6d6 psychic damage and makes a WIS save (DC 14) or is incapacitated for 1d4 rounds.

name: Psychic Possession
description: One creature makes a WIS save (DC 14) or you control its body for 1 hour. Your own body collapses unconscious while possessing.

name: Total Mind Wipe
description: One creature makes a WIS save (DC 15) or all memories of a subject of your choice are permanently erased.

name: Mass Psionic Assault
description: All creatures within a near-sized area take 8d6 psychic damage and make a WIS save (DC 15) or are incapacitated for 1d4 rounds.

name: Healing Touch
description: You touch a creature and restore 1d6 HP through focused psionic energy.

name: Deaden Pain
description: One creature you touch cannot feel pain for 1 hour. They are immune to pain penalties and can act normally even at 0 HP until the spell ends (then collapse).

name: Psychic Diagnosis
description: You touch a creature and instantly know their current HP, any diseases, poisons, or curses affecting them, and whether they are near death.

name: Empathy
description: You send calming psychic energy to one creature within near range. It immediately loses the frightened, charmed, or berserk condition.

name: Stabilize
description: You touch a dying creature at 0 HP. It immediately stabilizes and no longer loses HP.

name: Cleanse Poison
description: You remove one poison or disease from a creature you touch.

name: Boost
description: One creature you touch gains advantage on STR, DEX, or CON checks (your choice) for the duration.

name: Psychic Bandage
description: Wounds on a creature you touch close visibly. They recover 1d4 HP now and 1d4 HP at the start of your next turn.

name: Pain Strike
description: You project agony into one creature within near range. It takes 1d6 psychic damage and has disadvantage on its next attack roll (CON save DC 12 negates disadvantage).

name: Share Sense
description: You link your senses to a willing creature you touch. You see and hear through them (and they through you) for the duration.

name: Greater Healing
description: You touch a creature and restore 2d6 HP.

name: Cure Paralysis
description: You restore full movement to one paralyzed, restrained, or slowed creature you touch.

name: Mass Empathy
description: All creatures within near range that you choose immediately lose one negative condition (frightened, charmed, or enraged).

name: Psychic Surgery
description: You perform rapid mental healing. Remove one of: broken bone, internal injury, blindness, deafness, or a non-magical disease from a creature you touch.

name: Trauma Shield
description: One creature you touch cannot drop below 1 HP for the duration. Damage that would reduce them below 1 HP is negated instead.

name: Mass Healing
description: Up to four creatures within near range each recover 2d6 HP.

name: Restoration
description: You touch a creature and remove all conditions, curses, poisons, and diseases affecting it.

name: Regenerate
description: One creature you touch regains HP equal to your level at the start of each of their turns for the duration.

name: Resurrect
description: You restore a recently dead creature (dead less than 1 hour) to life. They return at 1 HP on a successful CHA check (DC 13).

name: Full Restoration
description: You touch a creature and fully restore their HP, remove all conditions, and end all curses and diseases.

name: Mass Restoration
description: Up to four creatures within near range recover 3d6 HP each and are freed of all conditions, poisons, and diseases.

name: Sever Pain
description: You project psionic agony into one creature. It takes 4d6 psychic damage and is incapacitated with pain for 1d4 rounds (CON save DC 14 negates incapacitation).

name: True Resurrection
description: You restore a dead creature to life with full HP, regardless of how long they have been dead or the condition of their remains.

name: Mass Full Restoration
description: All allies within near range are restored to full HP and freed of all conditions, curses, and diseases.

name: Sense Evil
description: You detect the presence and rough location of evil-aligned beings, undead, and demons within far range.

name: Sixth Sense
description: You sense danger moments before it arrives. You cannot be surprised and have advantage on initiative rolls for the duration.

name: See Aura
description: You read one creature or object's aura: power level, alignment, active magic or psionic effects, and emotional state.

name: Mind Block
description: Creatures cannot read your thoughts, detect your presence psionically, or sense your aura while this is active.

name: Commune with Spirit
description: You speak with a ghost or spirit within near range. It must answer three questions to the best of its knowledge, then departs.

name: Meditation
description: You enter focused meditation for 10 minutes. Recover one expended spell slot and gain advantage on your next WIS or CHA check.

name: Healing Touch
description: You touch a creature and restore 1d4 HP through psionic focus.

name: Resist Magic
description: You grant yourself or one creature you touch resistance to one school of magic (choose when casting). Treat affected spells as dealing half damage.

name: Astral Sense
description: You extend your senses into the astral plane, seeing astral entities, auras, and magical constructs overlaid on the physical world.

name: Detect Psionic
description: You sense whether any creature within near range has psionic ability, and roughly how powerful.

name: Empathic Reading
description: By spending one minute near a creature, you learn its general emotional state, whether it is lying, and one dominant thought or concern.

name: Object Sense
description: You touch an object and receive impressions of its recent history — significant events, strong emotions, who last held it.

name: Telepathy
description: You read the surface thoughts of one creature within near range. Each round you focus, the GM tells you its immediate thoughts.

name: Exorcism
description: You expel a possessing entity or spirit from a creature or place. It makes a WIS save (DC 12) or is cast out.

name: Psychic Blast
description: A psionic shockwave strikes one creature for 2d6 psychic damage. It makes a WIS save (DC 12) or is stunned for 1 round.

name: Clairvoyance
description: You see and hear through any point you can visualize within 1 mile, as if standing there invisibly.

name: Mind Link
description: You form a silent mental bond with up to three willing creatures, communicating wordlessly at any range.

name: Banish Spirit
description: One ghost, spirit, or ethereal entity within near range makes a WIS save (DC 13) or is expelled to the afterlife or its plane of origin.

name: Mass Sense
description: You read the aura and surface thoughts of all creatures within near range simultaneously.

name: Plane Shift
description: You and one willing creature you touch are transported to the astral plane or back to the physical plane.

name: Greater Exorcism
description: You can expel possessing entities from up to your level in creatures simultaneously. Each makes a WIS save (DC 13) or the entity is expelled.

name: Psionic Shield
description: A protective psionic field surrounds one creature you touch, granting +4 AC and advantage on saves against magic and psionics.

name: Soul Sense
description: You read the deepest nature of one creature within close range — its true alignment, secret fears, hidden agenda, and most guarded memory. No save.

name: Astral Fortress
description: You create a psionic barrier in a near-sized area. No psionic or magical effect can penetrate it while you focus.

name: Mass Banishment
description: All spirits, ghosts, and ethereal entities within near range make WIS saves (DC 14) or are immediately expelled.

name: Cosmic Sight
description: You see all things simultaneously — all creatures within 1 mile, their auras, intentions, and hidden truths. During this round you cannot be deceived, surprised, or caught unaware.

name: Soul Anchor
description: You bind a dying creature's spirit. It cannot depart until you release it or the spell ends. The creature remains at -1 HP and cannot die while anchored.

name: Mind Bolt
description: A focused burst of mental force strikes one creature within near range for 1d6 psychic damage.

name: Telekinetic Push
description: You hurl one object or creature psionically. Objects up to 50 lbs fly near in any direction. Creatures make a STR save (DC 12) or are pushed near and knocked prone.

name: Mind Block
description: Creatures cannot read your thoughts, sense your presence psionically, affect you with charm, or attempt possession while this is active.

name: See Aura
description: You read one creature or object's aura: power level, alignment, emotional state, and any active magical or psionic effects.

name: Psionic Sense
description: You detect whether any creature within near range has psionic ability and roughly how powerful it is.

name: Meditation
description: You center yourself in 10 minutes of focus. Recover one expended spell slot and clear your mind of confusion, charm, or fear.

name: Telekinetic Lift
description: You lift one object within near range weighing up to 100 lbs and hold it aloft, moving it a close distance per round while focused.

name: Empathic Link
description: You form a brief psychic connection with one creature within close range. You sense its precise emotional state and whether it is hiding something.

name: Healing Touch
description: You touch a creature and restore 1d4 HP through focused psionic energy.

name: Alter Aura
description: You mask your true aura from psychic detection. You may appear to be any alignment, any psionic strength, or entirely mundane.

name: Telepathy
description: You read the surface thoughts of one creature within near range. Each round you focus, the GM tells you its immediate thoughts.

name: Telekinetic Grip
description: You seize one creature within near range in a psionic vice. It makes a STR save (DC 12) or is restrained for the duration.

name: Psychic Blast
description: A psionic shockwave strikes one creature for 2d6 psychic damage. It makes a WIS save (DC 12) or is stunned for 1 round.

name: Psi-Sword
description: You manifest a blade of psionic force. It ignores physical armor (treat target as AC 10) and deals 1d8 + your CHA modifier damage.

name: Minor Mind Control
description: One creature of LV 2 or less makes a WIS save (DC 12) or follows a simple verbal command (one action).

name: Telekinetic Barrage
description: You hurl up to four objects within near range simultaneously, each striking a different target for 1d6 damage each.

name: Domination
description: One humanoid of LV 4 or less makes a WIS save (DC 13) or is under your mental command for 1 hour. It won't harm itself.

name: Mass Healing
description: Up to four creatures within near range each recover 2d6 HP through psionic restoration.

name: Psionic Drain
description: You drain psionic or magical energy from one creature. It loses one spell slot (or equivalent) and you recover 1d6 HP.

name: Possess
description: One creature makes a WIS save (DC 14) or you control its body for 1 hour. Your body collapses unconscious while possessing.

name: Telekinetic Storm
description: You hurl everything in the environment at creatures in a near-sized area. All creatures inside take 4d6 damage.

name: Mass Mind Control
description: Up to 1d4 humanoids of LV 4 or less within near range each make a WIS save (DC 14) or are under your mental command.

name: Mind Wipe
description: One creature makes a WIS save (DC 15) or all memories of a period or subject of your choice are permanently erased.

name: Total Domination
description: Up to six creatures you can see within near range each make a WIS save (DC 15) or fall under your mental control for 1 hour.
